channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car has been there at least 8 weeks, 21st March
item.description:
Car has been in Wadeville Close for at least 8 weeks with no one attending or moving it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wadeville Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed drain, 21st March
item.description:
There is a collapsed drain cover which has created a big and dangerous hole in the model of the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Estate, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet and underlay dumped on green, 21st March
item.description:
Carpet and underlay and household rubbish dumped yet again on green between 91 and 113 Petersham Driver Just before the yellow reduce speed now sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cut down in road, 21st March
item.description:
I live in 6 Springfield Road, Bexleyheath and about a year ago the tree outside my house was cut down because it was rotten. The man said that the council would replace it. I would just like to know if this is going to happen as I miss having a tree outside my house. It looks wrong having the gap there. I know this isn't urgent, but would like to know. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two separate rubbish / fly tipping, 21st March
item.description:
Pram and abandoned rubbish / mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Pothole in middle of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Steynton Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Potholes, 21st March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Greater London

item.title: Corner of Exford Road and Senlac Road, 21st March
item.description:
This pothole could cause an accident as it's on the 273 bus route and the very fast corner when driving up Senlac Road and turning left into Exford Road. It has increased in area and depth in the last week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Exford Road, Chinbrook, Grove Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox in middle of the road :(, 21st March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London

item.title: Becoming a regular fly tip at this area, 21st March
item.description:
As above. Loose boards dumped during the hours of darkness 20/21 March.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Strimmer damage to cherry trees., 21st March
item.description:
The Council contractor has damaged the young cherry trees next to the Playground by cutting into the bark which will potentially kill the tree by cutting into the cambium layer. Please instruct your contractor not to strim so close in future. Ideally a tree guard should be installed to prevent future damage. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radlet Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin needs emptying, 21st March
item.description:
Litter bin needs emptying

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Firemans Alley, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left by bus stop, 21st March
item.description:
Someone keeps leaving a bag of rubbish next to the bus stop outside my premises by the bus stop . This happens at least twice a week , which means that that with foxes around it ends up in my front garden. I am getting fed up with keep having to tell you about this complaint and want it stopped as soon as possible. Please let me know how you intend to deal with this continuing problem. D Clatworthy
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boevey Path, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on road and pavement., 21st March
item.description:
This is a hazard to vehicles pedestrians and animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
